comments.author: @GlobalRealLifeDocumentary
comments.text: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most mysterious destinations—filled with striking white-marble cities, ancient Silk Road history, and the famous "Door to Hell." 🇹🇲 After watching this documentary, what's the first thing you'd want to see in Turkmenistan, and do you think it's the most underrated country in Central Asia?

comments.author: @RealLifeGlobalDocumentary
comments.text: Turkmenistan is home to the famous Darvaza Gas Crater, often called "The Door to Hell" 🔥🏜.The crater has been burning continuously for decades, creating one of the most surreal landscapes on Earth.

comments.author: @skbachoti
comments.text: If the gods want to punish you for some reason, you are born in this country!@!
